import os
from celery import shared_task
from myapp.config import get_smtp_config, get_aws_config


@shared_task
def send_email(recipient, subject, body):
    config = get_smtp_config()
    server = smtplib.SMTP(config.host, config.port)
    server.login(config.user, config.password)
    server.sendmail(config.user, recipient, body)


@shared_task
def upload_to_s3(file_path, bucket_name):
    config = get_aws_config()
    s3 = boto3.client("s3", aws_access_key_id=config.key_id,
                       aws_secret_access_key=config.secret, region_name=config.region)
    s3.upload_file(file_path, bucket_name, file_path)
